subject: AAF Charts
commit_message:
AAF Charts

-PS3-MK
 -renaming charts to remove hyphen
 -refactoring service name configuration.  It wasn't quite correct
  the way it was.  It was taking the chart name as the service name
  and not using the values.yaml from the top level chart as intended.
 -Jonathan asked to name the main app service "aaf-service and cassandra
  to "aaf-cass" as this is what is in the cert
 -squashed https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/45923/1 into this commit.
 -updated robot to the latest settings
 Robot tests are failing but all pods come up.  I think this can be merged
 and the AAF team investigate the robot health issue in a running system

-PS4-MK
 -reverting sms changes and taking the latest from master
 -removing repository from the global section of the aaf values.
  -this was causing all images to be pulled from nexus3.onap.org
   which was failing to pull images that come from docker hub.
   There is supposed to be a proxy through nexus3 to dockerhub but maybe
   we are missing something.

-PS5-MK
 -removing nodeports from non gui related charts.  There are conflicts

-PS6-Kiran
 -Adding imagepullsecrets for aaf-sms-vault subchart
 -updated image repository to pull from nexus3
 -tested and works now and should fix the pull errors

-PS7-Kiran
 -Previous patch picked up a couple of unintended changes
 -Reverting them

-PS8-MK
  -removing names from identities
  -using https for robot test

Issue-ID: OOM-930

Change-Id: I98f40ef5af03dda73aebf12f6fa48d928915ab34
Signed-off-by: Mahendra Raghuwanshi <mahendra.raghuwanshi@amdocs.com>

Add Beijing CQLs into OOM

Issue-ID: AAF-114
Change-Id: I2c2d46738ba0885c41f710997d4b212b6ce4d2de
Signed-off-by: Instrumental <jonathan.gathman@att.com>
Signed-off-by: Mandeep Khinda <mandeep.khinda@amdocs.com>
Signed-off-by: Kiran Kamineni <kiran.k.kamineni@intel.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 3: Commit message was updated.

Patch Set 3:

(1 comment)

Please change the name of sms to aaf-sms.
Rest all is looking good, thnx for the taking this up.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1

The SMS charts here are old. Can you use the SMS charts from master? Mahendra said that they were failing to come up because of some pull error. I forced a nexus3 sync for vault version 0.10.0 and if it is trying to pull from nexus3, it should work. I tried a manual docker pull nexus3.onap.org:10001/vault:0.10.0 and it worked for me.

Patch Set 3:

> The SMS charts here are old. Can you use the SMS charts from
 > master? Mahendra said that they were failing to come up because of
 > some pull error. I forced a nexus3 sync for vault version 0.10.0
 > and if it is trying to pull from nexus3, it should work. I tried a
 > manual docker pull nexus3.onap.org:10001/vault:0.10.0 and it worked
 > for me.
Ok, so Mandeep has to take the aaf-sms charts from master and discard the charts include here in this review and we are good to go.

Yes. Sounds alright to me. I can do a deploy on my side once a new patch is up to test everything too.

Patch Set 3:

Was seeing the same pull issue from nexus3 from K8s when I flipped to the aaf-sms charts from master.  I could pull manually using docker though as Kiran said.
8m          8m           2         dev-aaf-sms-vault-0.152b72b0fba7bc29                Pod           spec.containers{aaf-sms-vault}                   Warning   Failed                  kubelet, k8s-4          Failed to pull image "nexus3.onap.org:10001/vault:0.10.0": rpc error: code = Unknown desc = Tag 0.10.0 not found in repository nexus3.onap.org:10001/vault

8m          8m           2         dev-aaf-sms-vault-0.152b72b116984809                Pod           spec.containers{aaf-sms-vault-backend}           Warning   Failed                  kubelet, k8s-4          Failed to pull image "nexus3.onap.org:10001/consul:1.0.6": rpc error: code = Unknown desc = Tag 1.0.6 not found in repository nexus3.onap.org:10001/consul

Making it pull directly from docker.io fixes the issue however, I think we might need to do something like this to get it to proxy through another repo:

repository: nexus3.onap.org:10001
image: library/consul:1.0.6

Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1

Looks good to me.
Maybe the _repository.tpl needs to be modified.
Instead of default .Values.repository .Values.global.repository, maybe it should be the other way around.
Use .Values.global.repository as the default if a .Values.repository is not given.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

Tried the latest patch on my cluster. Everything comes up as expected.

Patch Set 7:

Uploaded patches here to fix the pull issue being seen in some situations for vault and consul. Diff 7 vs 5 to see the changes.

Patch Set 8: Code-Review+2 Verified+1

Verified with Jonathan in Mandeep's windriver lab.
Change has been successfully merged by Mandeep Khinda

Patch Set 8:

I think after the merge of this one, we hit the 1Mb limitation again:
[storage/driver] 2018/05/08 09:48:01 create: failed to create: ConfigMap "aaa.v1" is invalid: data: Too long: must have at most 1048576 characters
[tiller] 2018/05/08 09:48:01 warning: Failed to record release aaa: ConfigMap "aaa.v1" is invalid: data: Too long: must have at most 1048576 characters
